title: glandularia nana
intro: Glandularia nana, also known as dwarf verbena, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and its ability to soothe digestive issues. Glandularia nana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
